listedAppraisers.name: Edward Kitson
listedAppraisers.description: Edward Kitson provides professional art appraisal services specializing in IRS-compliant estate tax appraisals, Fine art collections, Antiques and decorative arts, Divorce/inheritance fair division appraisals, Insurance documentation. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Randall's Fine Art & Custom Framing
listedAppraisers.description: Randall's Fine Art & Custom Framing was established in 1994 in Las Vegas, Nevada. They design and build custom frames and displays for a variety of projects ranging from fine art to memorabilia. Services include conservation picture framing, art appraisals, canvas stretching, dry mounting, photo and canvas printing, and laser cutting and etching.

listedAppraisers.name: Art At Your Door Gallery II
listedAppraisers.description: Art At Your Door Gallery II is a well-established Las Vegas art gallery and consultation service located on West Sahara Avenue. They offer custom framing, art appraisal services, and art consultation with over a decade of experience serving the Las Vegas community.

listedAppraisers.name: Absolute Art LLC
listedAppraisers.description: Absolute Art LLC provides professional art installation and appraisal services in Las Vegas. They specialize in hanging and installing mirrors, tapestries, sconces, flat panel TVs, and fine art. Their A+ BBB rating reflects their commitment to quality service and professional standards.
